situation: Reusable atag docs overfit the human speaker label to Sam after PR #30
learning: In reusable skill/protocol docs, define the human speaker label as the user's preferred short label first; use Sam only as the local example and say to replace it.

situation: Added --human-label runtime configurability when Sam asked for the skill docs to define the example human name
learning: Do not turn documentation naming clarification into runtime configuration unless the user asks for behavior/config changes; keep the simpler docs-level convention when that is the stated scope.
